hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qEi 'rm\s+-rf\s+[/~.]|git\s+push\s+(-f|--force)|sudo\s+rm|DROP\s+TABLE|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+checkout\s+--\s+\.|git\s+clean\s+-fd|curl.*\|\s*(ba)?sh|npm\s+publish|docker\s+push|terraform\s+apply|terraform\s+destroy|kubectl\s+delete\s+(namespace|ns)'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked: destructive or sensitive operation. Ask user for explicit approval."}'; else echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qEi '\.(env|pem|key|cert|p12|pfx)$|/\.ssh/|/\.aws/|/\.gnupg/'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked: writing to credential or secret file."}'; else echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi
